evals.prompt: Plan a product launch campaign for a new cold brew coffee line targeting millennials with a $50,000 budget
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive multi-channel campaign plan with objectives, audience targeting, channel allocation, timeline, and KPI framework

assertions.text: Campaign objectives are SMART (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound)
Budget allocation across channels totals the specified $50,000
Channel mix includes at least 3 channels appropriate for millennial targeting
Timeline includes specific milestones with dates and dependencies
KPI framework defines primary and secondary metrics with realistic targets

evals.prompt: Create a B2B lead generation campaign for an enterprise SaaS product with a 6-month timeline
evals.expected_output: A B2B-focused campaign plan with LinkedIn emphasis, content marketing funnel, ABM tactics, and sales-marketing alignment

assertions.text: Plan includes account-based marketing (ABM) tactics for enterprise targeting
Content funnel maps to awareness, consideration, and decision stages
LinkedIn and professional channels are prioritized over consumer channels
Lead scoring criteria and MQL/SQL definitions are included

evals.prompt: Design a holiday season e-commerce campaign for Black Friday through Christmas
evals.expected_output: A seasonal campaign with phased execution (teaser, launch, sustain, close-out), promotional calendar, and urgency-driven tactics

assertions.text: Campaign is phased with distinct pre-Black Friday, Black Friday, Cyber Monday, and holiday gift phases
Email sequence includes at least 5 touchpoints across the campaign period
Retargeting strategy addresses cart abandonment and browse abandonment
